cards.flavor_text: [i]The Piercelights are extremely zealous in their rites and practices, especially when it comes to maintaining the Prismatica Veil. This often results in them going head to head with other factions, especially the various druidic circles, who have a much more free-form approach to maintaining the Prismatica Veil.[/i]
